description: BILL provides software for automating business payments, receivables, spend management, and related financial workflows. Its platform supports accounts payable, accounts receivable, virtual cards, reimbursements, and partner-managed organization operations.
summary: BILL exposes documented HTTP APIs for v3 AP/AR, Spend & Expense, partner operations, and legacy v2 AP/AR; all require BILL-issued credentials, and no first-party GraphQL, MCP server, or CLI surface was found on bill.com.
